title: Hawk Tuah Llama
description: Adds Hawk Tuah sound to llamas spitting.
body:
Here’s the Hawk Tuah Llama mod. Every time a llama spits, it makes a ridiculous Hawk Tuah sound. It’s not supposed to be funny... It’s just there to make you wonder why someone bothered to code it.
